description_long: This is a stylized adult male pedestrian with a modern urban appearance. He wears a short-sleeved shirt featuring a bold diagonal stripe and a large number on the back, paired with cargo-style pants and casual sneakers. His face is partially covered by a bandana or mask, adding a sense of anonymity and street style. The figure has a distinctive spiked hairstyle and a fit, athletic build. Visible details include rolled-up sleeves, side cargo pockets, and a fitted silhouette. The overall look suggests a youthful, active individual commonly seen in contemporary city environments.
description: A modern adult male pedestrian with a spiked hairstyle, face mask, short-sleeved shirt, cargo pants, and sneakers, exuding urban street style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the spiked hairstyle, face mask, shirt with diagonal stripe, and relaxed stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the shirt's stripe, arm tattoo, and cargo pocket details on the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large number and text on the back of the shirt, as well as the back of the hairstyle and pants.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the mask, shirt stripe, and additional cargo pocket details.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved athletic shirt, cargo pants, face mask, casual streetwear
